name: NOVA — RESET
tagline: K-pop group third comeback album promotional site

brief.name: NOVA
brief.industry: 5-member K-pop group's third comeback album promotional site
brief.audience: Fans aged 14-28 globally — Twitter/X, TikTok, Instagram. International (English, Korean, Spanish, Japanese major markets). Engaged daily, follow comeback teaser schedules religiously. Spend $50-500 per comeback on albums, merch, photocards.
brief.tone: hyperpop, optimistic, kitsch, electric, irreverent, joyful, knowingly-nostalgic, alive
brief.references: BLACKPINK's official site era, NewJeans' "Get Up" promo materials, early-2000s Vogue Korea covers, Charli XCX's "365 / Brat" promo era, Frutiger Aero desktop wallpapers, MSN Messenger UI nostalgia
brief.context: Hero must include the comeback title "RESET ✦ 2026" set in massive chunky display type with iridescent gradient fill. Include a countdown timer to album release date. Sections: Hero (with countdown), Tracklist (8 tracks with hover-reveal 30-second previews), Concept Photos (5 member teaser images, hover reveals B-side photo), Pre-order (3 versions — Standard $24, Deluxe $42 with photobook, Limited Pop-Up $68 with member-specific photocard), Schedule (comeback teaser timeline with dates), Footer (label info, social handles, multi-language switcher EN/KR/ES/JP).
brief.avoid: Anything corporate-feeling. Tasteful muted palettes. Single-accent restraint. Serif body text. "Premium" framing. Stock fonts like Inter or Helvetica. Anything that looks like Spotify's website.
